2: And And vowed unto the mighty God God of Jacob;
3: Nor go up into my bed;
4: I will not give sleep to mine eyes, or or slumber to mine eyelids,
5: An habitation for the mighty God God of Jacob.
6: We found it in the fields of the wood.
7: We will worship at his footstool.
8: Thou, and the ark of thy strength.
9: And let thy saints shout for joy.
10: Turn not away the face of thine anointed.
11: Will I set upon thy throne.
12: Their children shall also sit upon thy throne for evermore.
13: He hath desired it it for his habitation.
14: Here will I dwell; for I have desired it.
15: I will satisfy her poor with bread.
16: And her saints shall shout aloud for joy.
17: I have ordained a lamp for mine anointed.
18: But upon himself shall his crown flourish.
